prompt: Healthcare clinical trials platform with 5 audit findings (Mode C)

assertions.text: Output contains the report header with Application, Date, Domain, and Input mode fields
Output contains a System Profile section with Principals, Asset Classification, and Access Channels tables
Output contains between 5 and 10 abuse cases (AC-01 through AC-N)
Each abuse case has a BIL Score with Blast, Sensitivity, and Exploitability dimensions (each 1-3) and a criticality label
Each abuse case includes detection signals with both visible and blind spot categories
At least one abuse case identifies the RBAC-01 + RBAC-03 combination (cross-tenant access + unfiltered PHI export) as a high/critical compound risk
Output contains a Findings-to-Abuse Mapping table that references all 5 audit findings (RBAC-01 through RBAC-05)
At least one abuse case is flagged as having no corresponding audit finding (business logic, integration trust, or social engineering)
Output contains a Risk Summary section with criticality breakdown and recommended remediation order
Abuse cases are ordered by BIL score descending (highest risk first)
